message:
refactor(parser): simplify cluster title backfill with let-chains, remove dead Subgraph AST variant, fix DOT parser test

- ir_builder: use let-chain syntax to simplify the cluster/subgraph
  title backfill conditionals (Rust 2024 edition feature)
- mermaid_parser: remove the unused FlowAst::Subgraph variant and its
  lowering arm — subgraphs are already created via the document-level
  subgraph/end block parsing, making the AST-level variant dead code.
  Also fix the root-level vs nested parsing flag (stop_on_end → is_root)
  for clearer semantics.
- dot_parser: replace escaped-quotes test with a multiple-attribute-blocks
  test that validates the label deduplication from the previous commit.
- fm-render-svg: minor addition.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
